title: tanacetum japonicum
intro: Tanacetum japonicum, also known as Japanese tansy, is a perennial herb that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Tanacetum japonicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate its therapeutic effects.
